testcase.name: test_create_budget_request_draft
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_budget_requests.py:136: in test_create_budget_request_draft assert response.status_code == 201, f"Expected 201, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 201, got 200: {"id":"4f78325e-0d67-48d2-9ebb-47cce8822ddc","user_id":"7d03cff4-4db2-4b2e-969b-f5b3d57d58a6","user_name":"Surya Yadavalli","title":"TEST_Marketing Event Budget Q1","description":"Budget for Q1 marketing events","line_items":[{"id":"63414159-6940-463f-b8a8-e188137019d6","category_id":"event_participation","category_label":"Event Participation","lead_id":null,"lead_name":null,"lead_city":null,"sku_id":null,"sku_name":null,"bottle_count":null,"price_per_unit":null,"amount":50000.0,"notes":"Tech conference participation fee"}],"total_amount":50000.0,"event_name":"Tech Summit 2026","event_date":"2026-03-15","event_city":"Bengaluru","status":"draft","approved_by":null,"approved_by_name":null,"approval_date":null,"rejection_reason":null,"created_at":"2026-03-01T13:28:28.840769+00:00","updated_at":"2026-03-01T13:28:28.840771+00:00"} E assert 200 == 201 E + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code
